# TokScript

> TokScript extracts transcripts from TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts, then runs them through 3 AI agents trained on 20,000+ viral videos to generate hooks, scripts, and virality breakdowns. 41,000+ creators. 2.6M+ videos processed.

- Built with Next.js, Chrome Extension on Chrome Web Store
- AI agents powered by OpenAI GPT-4o and Anthropic Claude 3.5 Sonnet
- Supports 100+ languages with 99% transcription accuracy
- Free plan available; Pro plans at $10/month or $39/year

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://tokscript.com/): TikTok transcript generator — paste a link, get the transcript in 3 seconds
- [Features](https://tokscript.com/features): Overview of all tools — transcript extraction, bulk import, AI agents, Chrome extension, team collaboration, and more
- [Pricing](https://tokscript.com/pricing): Free, Monthly ($10/mo), and Annual ($39/yr) plans with full feature comparison

## Platform-Specific Generators

- [Instagram Transcript Generator](https://tokscript.com/instagram-transcript-generator): Extract transcripts from Instagram Reels
- [YouTube Transcript Generator](https://tokscript.com/youtube-transcript-generator): Extract transcripts from YouTube Shorts

## Product

- [API Documentation](https://tokscript.com/api): REST API for transcript extraction and AI analysis integration
- [Integrations](https://tokscript.com/integration): Zapier, Slack, and Google Docs connections
- [Affiliate Program](https://tokscript.com/affiliate): 40% recurring commission — $15.60/annual referral, $4/monthly referral
